eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: San Miguel, NM; at 04:36 PM ON APR 22, 2026 Effective until 06:36 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
San Miguel Fire Department: WILDFIRE WARNING.

Prepare to evacuate if on hwy 266 between mile marker 1 and 3 or 4 to 6.

Visibility in area will be reduced and roads/evacuation routes can become blocked; if you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed.

IF you are alone and unable to evacuate, contact local authorities at 911.
